hazard.summary: OpenAI Codex retry logic collapses 429 and 5xx into the same exponential backoff path, ignoring Retry-After and exhausting retries inside provider cooldown
signals: packages/ai/src/providers/openai-codex-responses.ts uses pure exponential backoff for 429 responses.
isRetryableError() collapses 429 and 5xx into the same retry path.
When OpenAI returns Retry-After: 60, all retry attempts fire inside the cooldown window and fail.
Issue #4377 was closed as completed via PR #4486: fix(ai): OpenAI Codex SSE - prefer retry-after for retry timeout over default fallback.

constraints: 429 rate-limit responses must be classified separately from 5xx transient server failures before retry scheduling.
Retry-After must be treated as the minimum retry delay for 429 responses when present.
Local exponential backoff must not schedule retries inside a provider-declared cooldown window.
Fallback exponential backoff may apply to 429 only when Retry-After is absent or unparsable.
verification: Simulate an OpenAI Codex 429 response with Retry-After: 60. Assert retry delay is at least 60 seconds rather than the default exponential delay.
Simulate a 5xx response. Assert the existing exponential backoff path still applies.
Simulate a 429 response without Retry-After. Assert fallback exponential backoff applies.
Run the regression tests added or updated in PR #4486.

impact.operator_impact: Agent runs stall because retry attempts are consumed before the provider cooldown window expires.
impact.business_consequence: Rate-limited sessions fail unnecessarily under load, wasting retry budget and increasing user-visible execution failures.

notes: This receipt captures a classifier-boundary failure: 429 and 5xx were both treated as generic retryable errors even though they require different retry semantics. The same Codex Retry-After failure shape had been confirmed in gsd-build/gsd-2, but this case adds the clearer taxonomy collapse: 5xx is transient backoff, while 429 must honor provider cooldown signals.

constraints: 429 and 5xx must be classified before retry scheduling.
Retry-After must be honored as a retry delay floor.
Local backoff must not override provider cooldown semantics.
anti_patterns: 429 and 5xx collapsed into one retry branch
pure exponential backoff on provider rate limit
retry attempts fired inside cooldown window
provider signal ignored at classifier boundary
